name: Democrats.org
subject: Add your name if you're not falling for Donald's lies
body:
Stand with Democrats as we fight back against Trump and the GOP
---
**Add your name: stand with Democrats against Donald Trump and the GOP.

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Fight-Back1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170305_ew_nd&source=em_20170305_ew_nd")**
Friend --

Donald Trump read a speech off a teleprompter on Tuesday night without raising his voice, declaring the media the enemy of state, or bragging about sexual assault -- so Republicans and political pundits declared him "presidential."

That's absurd.

His joint address to Congress, like every other time Donald has opened his mouth to speak, was filled with divisive rhetoric, lies, and hypocrisy. And while he said a lot of things that had cable news talking heads swooning, his actions in his first 40 days in office do not reflect the promises he made to the American people.

He said he wants to work with members of Congress to make child care accessible and affordable, but just last week military families stationed overseas lost their child care because of his hiring freeze.

He claimed he wants to invest in women's health, but he and the congressional Republicans who applauded him are hell-bent on dismantling the Affordable Care Act and defunding Planned Parenthood.

He said he wants to promote clean air and clean water, but earlier that very same day, he began to roll back parts of the Clean Water Act that protect freshwater streams, wetlands, and sources of drinking water. (Great news for polluters and golf course owners -- not so much for those of us who need to drink water to stay alive.)

While Republicans might have been fooled by Donald's performance, we certainly weren't. We see right through him and his lies -- and we are going to call him out every single time his actions don't match his words.

**Add your name to stand with Democrats as we hold Donald Trump accountable:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Fight-Back1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170305_ew_nd&source=em_20170305_ew_nd")**
Thanks,

Eric

Eric Walker
Deputy Communications Director
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c44d/4067b0a/2d12e2e70/7e7c8168/883460329/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170305_ew_nd&source=em_20170305_ew_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c44d/4067b0a/2d12e2e70/7e7c8169/883460329/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170305_ew_nd&source=em_20170305_ew_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c44d/4067b0a/2d12e2e70/7e7c8176/883460329/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170305_ew_nd&source=em_20170305_ew_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c44d/4067b0a/2d12e2e70/7e7c8177/883460329/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170305_ew_nd&source=em_20170305_ew_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Jill Vogel for Virginia
subject: Jill Vogel Wins Big in Prince William County!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Vogel for Virginia45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100Warrenton, VA 20186
body:
Republicans continue to unite around Jill Vogel
---
| | | | | | |
---
| | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
March 5th, 2017

**GAINESVILLE, VA - **State Senator Jill Vogel won the Lieutenant Governor straw poll at the Prince William County GOP Lincoln-Reagan Dinner Saturday night with over 57 percent of the vote.Prince William is a swing county that will be crucial to a GOP victory November. Vogel's strength among the hundreds of activists and community leaders gathered at this dinner demonstrates that Vogel has the momentum to win in June."Virginia Republicans continue to unify behind Jill Vogel because they see in her a positive candidate and the best running mate for the entire GOP ticket," noted campaign manager Pat Trueman. ** __**"Jill decisively won this straw poll because her substantive and conservative record is unmatched in this race." In this crucial test of grassroots strength, Vogel, an ethics attorney, posted a decisive victory in a critical county over fellow challengers, former Prince William County police officer Bryce Reeves, and Virginia Beach businessman Glenn Davis.
Vogel expressed deep appreciation for the support and complimented the GOP leadership for a tremendous event where Carly Fiorina was the keynote and gave an inspiring message about the election in 2017.

Full Results are as Follows:**Jill Vogel - 57.4%**
**Bryce Reeves - 29.8%**
**Glenn Davis - 12.8%**
P. S., Help us win and show your support by [ordering your free Jill Vogel for Lieutenant Governor bumper stickers on our campaign website](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uLFX13TNybgN9cKh9t48NcuP08ardhUyJK01iuD7zNsWvYSQ0hT1Vv4t_dJU9W7MXzZgiSC2i6Bdg79kj1n8y5CZvm07rWEqUjt82Khbstm1IDGGWC2kFV_OBxOd6BfPHs6Mya4AyGF7Z6up1wjn4mLnU9sovLrblH8uF5WYXUODEpKYfBoNQ1b4OxRw2vh3HLbFNwuweGu_eL41Y2vpSQ==&c=q60DKl8lD__bgV959dhREW1YOvijjd_FXlwErJs5ZIlYVtuQMlQS9w==&ch=zEKAG-Iz5V-PALL6ST6kc9CL0OHkkMdPwShGIV9_6ukhxZhqUufRcQ==). These high-quality, fully-removable bumper stickers are a great way to show your support for the race's conservative frontrunner.

name: The White House
subject: Believe, once more, in America
body:
Share your thoughts on President Trump's first Address to a Joint Session of Congress. |
[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d36ab8c1ed381e9d47d78fd00c40ee362d8eea3631b0f4691db902fcf7ad965afb3ca3ddaf70a280e1dd1abcb7ad110431aac4084bd59a08)

**“The torch is now in our hands. And we will use it to light up the world.”
– President Donald J. Trump**
Earlier this week, President Donald J. Trump stood in front of America and introduced a new chapter of American greatness; one full of prosperity, safety, and innovation.

Building on his successful first 40 days in office, President Trump laid out bold plans to improve infrastructure, bolster national security, and ensure all Americans can achieve the American dream.

President Trump’s speech resonated with legislators and Americans alike:

* “Tonight, an optimistic President shared a bold agenda to get America back on track and restore the American dream for everyone.” –Congressman Kenny Marchant (TX-24)
* “President Trump campaigned on a promise of making America great again, and tonight he offered a bold, uplifting vision for how to reach that goal – one that every American can share in.” –Congresswoman Diane Black (TN-06)
* “President Trump is taking action to fulfill the commitments he made to the American people.” –Senator Roy Blunt (R-MO)
* “Genuinely one of the most powerful moments I can remember from a presidential speech.” –Charlie Sykes, MSNBC

Tens of thousands of Americans gave us input before the President addressed the Nation. We listened because we want to hear directly from Americans like you. Please take just a few seconds and let us know your opinions on President Trump’s speech and vision for the future.

**[Share Your Thoughts](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d36ab8c1ed381e9d47d78fd00c40ee362d8eea3631b0f4691db902fcf7ad965afb3ca3ddaf70a280e1dd1abcb7ad110431aac4084bd59a08)**
Tuesday night wasn’t about President Trump – it was about all Americans. It was about looking to the future, instead of dwelling on the past. It was about dreaming big, seizing the moment, and never giving up.

President Trump will fight for this country and every American until the fight is won. As he said, “The time for small thinking is over.” So let’s think big. Let’s dare to win again. And let’s keep on winning, TOGETHER.

**[Share Your Thoughts](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d36ab8c1ed381e9d47d78fd00c40ee362d8eea3631b0f4691db902fcf7ad965afb3ca3ddaf70a280e1dd1abcb7ad110431aac4084bd59a08)**

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d36ab8c1ed381e9d3055eef55899d2315b720d3a6759460cbc54895a20e22a9d09c03b0e3a03964e41ff61b01366bc34104eb511823162a7) [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d36ab8c1ed381e9d601c6a4f8e0216141c9fda5e2d470fe74194f45070ec45b563bd639106525e43d3ae666a6aa487327fdbf7a946ef5b14)[Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4a9d7bfda77e0b9c70dae92cb13d0376f5a8d0b2f9303c1d89f57a6a3261b8d22f5550d23e9718468888f9fc0a4ee7987)
